title: Elysium Spa Spearmint & Peppermint Epsom Salts
features: MINT MADNESS: Elysium Spa Spearmint & Peppermint Epsom Salts, a blend of soothing, refreshing and invigorating fragrance. Each reselable pack contains 3 fragranced bath bombs

BUBBLE FREE : Prefer the perfect scented, silky water to relax into? Elysium Spa Epsom Salts are the perfect addition to your bath, easy to use, just add water, add the bath bomb, which will gently and release it's fragrance. Relax and enjoy.

100 PercentNATURAL: Elysium Spa Mint Madness Epsom Salts, magnesium sulphate, a pure mineral compound with a variety of uses. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins.

THERAPEUTIC BATH: Elysium Spa Epsom Salts, whether soaking your feet or taking a bath in espsom salts, it will soothe muscle aches, relax the body and improve circulation. The Epsom Salts even treat sunburn. Adding epsom salts to a bath will help the relaxation of the body and mind to promote a restful night's sleep
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Elysium Spa Mint Madness, 100 PercentNatural Epsom Salts. Ready to use, resealable bag 450g

Ready to use, resealable bag 450g Ingredients Magnesium Sulphate, Parfum, Citral Directions Add approximately 2 handfuls to warm, running bath water for a wonderfully soothing & relaxing bath. Soak for at least 20 minutes to give the Elysium Spa Epsom Salts a chance to soften the skin and be absorbed. Safety Warning Caution: Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. specifications_table.title: Pressure Relief Valve for Triton 6Pcs, Mellbree PRD Disc Seals Cover Valve Shower Spares Parts Compatible with Triton Electric Showers
features: BROAD COMPATIBILITY: Our pressure relief device is designed to be compatible with Triton electric showers, including models such as Triton Agio, Triton Alicante, Triton Amber, Triton Aquablast, Triton Aquastorm, Triton Aquasurge, Triton Aquatronic 1 Plus, Triton Aspirante, Triton Aspirante Electric, Triton Aspirante Millenium, Triton Aspirante Topaz, Triton Aspirante Xr, Triton Belize, Triton Bezique 2, Triton Biarritz 2, Triton Biscay 2, and more.
NOTE: The PRD disc can often fail due to scale in hard water areas, Please replace it regularly.

UPGRADE SAFETY: Experience the latest upgrade with our Pressure Relief Device featuring a seal cover design. This innovative feature not only prevents leaks but also offers burst protection in case of excessively high shower pressure, ensuring a safer shower experience for you.

EFFORTLESS INSTALLATION: Mellbree shower pressure relief valve is specifically designed for Triton electric showers as a replacement for the 82800450 model. Simply remove your old pressure relief device and effortlessly install the new PRD replacement. With a leak-proof design, it ensures a secure fit to safeguard and maintain the functionality of your shower.

COMPLETE PACKAGE: We have observed that often it is the seal cover that breaks, so you don't need to spend money replacing the entire PRD, just the cover. You will get 6 seal cover that will give you peace of mind for almost a full year.
